meaning: [复]n.<口>(尤指健美运动员或举重运动员的) 胸肌
examples: Case in point: The pecs he put on display at a charity soccer match in his native Scotland in August.
Then, at the end, squeeze and flex your pecs, making sure to get every fiber involved in the movement.
Like for example in order to get better muscle tone in my abs, pecs and biceps, he makes me work out with free weights.
Not worn, but draped casually over one sculpted shoulder so as not to obscure one's rock-hard pecs.
Now life is colder than Al Gore's pecs.
